title: Fast Better Grass - Regions Unexplored Compat
description: Adds Fast Better Grass compatibility for Regions Unexplored
body: # [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass) - [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) Compat ![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87a3c8e188b156b9ed7f2f9c3d9a21c180e14eae.png) This resourcepack only includes the grass blocks, not the stones with the grass overlay to avoid confusion.
